panels.description: Medium shot of Scrooge standing behind a cluttered mahogany desk in his dark, cold office, gesturing dismissively with a quill at his nephew. Victorian era lighting, dusty atmosphere, intense and grumpy expression.

bubbles.text: What's Christmas time to you but a time for paying bills without money; a time for finding yourself a year older, but not an hour richer; a time for balancing your books and having every item in 'em through a round dozen of months presented dead against you? If I could work my will,

panels.description: Close up on the Nephew's face, shocked and indignant, sweat bead on forehead, Victorian collar visible. High contrast shadows.

bubbles.text: Uncle! Uncle! nephew! return the word!

panels.description: Medium shot of Scrooge clutching his chest, leaning over the desk in a fit of sudden, uncharacteristic agitation, wide angle lens. Background blurred dark ledgers.

bubbles.text: Uncle! nephew! return the word! Uncle! nephew! return the word!

panels.description: Extreme close up of Scrooge's eyes wide with manic energy, reflecting the cold office window, heavy ink-style hatching for high-intensity atmosphere.

bubbles.text: UNCLE! NEPHEW! RETURN THE WORD! RETURN IT!
